issues.title: Comprehensive Frontend Testing (UI, Functional, Unit) with Deep Edge-Case Coverage
issues.body:
Perform end-to-end validation of the frontend with deep test coverage across UI, functionality, and unit-level behavior.

Scope:
- UI Testing:
  - Verify layout, responsiveness, accessibility basics, visual consistency, and cross-page user flows.
  - Use Playwright for browser automation where available; if unavailable, perform best-effort manual/alternative checks and document limitations.
- Functional Testing:
  - Validate all critical user journeys, forms, API interactions, state transitions, loading/error/empty states, permissions, and recovery behavior.
- Unit Testing:
  - Add/extend unit tests for core components, hooks, utilities, and business logic with meaningful assertions and mocking strategy.

Depth Requirements:
- Include edge cases (invalid input, boundary values, network failures, timeouts, retries, race conditions, stale state, unexpected API payloads, and large data scenarios).
- Ensure regressions are prevented and existing behavior remains intact.

Deliverables:
- Test execution report summarizing:
  - Passed scenarios
  - Failed scenarios with reproducible steps
  - Observed bugs/errors
  - Improvement opportunities (testability, UX, performance, reliability)
- Actionable summary with prioritized fixes.

Definition of Done:
- Test suites are run and results are documented.
- Critical/high-impact issues are clearly identified.
- Final summary includes improvements, errors, and passed cases.
